metadata.name: DavidPack
metadata.description:
[h1]!!! THIS MOD REQUIRES REPENTAGON+ !!![/h1]
Hello there! Thank you for downloading this mod :D This mod which adds a lot of random things there isn't really a set theme: 20 Collectibles 2 Trinkets 1 Consumable 1 Transformation 3 Curses
[b]IsaacGuru:[/b] https://isaacguru.com/mod/davidpack
If you find any bugs please report them in the forum below
This mod is developed by just 1 person so updates might take a while to come out!
If you need/want to contact me for any reason add me on discord Discord Username: davidinspace_
Credits: [b]My friend Kroko[/b] - Came up with the name for Overcharged Battery Suggested Mixed Emotions [b]Random[/b] - Drew sprite for A Bit Of Chaos [b]Foks Booster Pack[/b] - Used as a reference for code when I wasn't sure what to do (especially the button for Risk Of Gambling) [b]Heavens Call[/b] - Used to figure out how to implement dead sea scrolls menu [b]Daydream All Day[/b] - Used as a reference for code [b]Lazymatt Pack[/b] - Helped me figure out how to make animated thumbnail [b]Romes Rig Emporium[/b] - Helped me figure out how to adding costumes works Also thanks to the Modding Of Isaac Discord server for helping me with stuff
